ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorological station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, wind speed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* The value of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag indicating if the data is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "global_cmp22" REAL /* Global CMP22 (vent/cor) measurement */,
  "direct_snip" REAL /* Direct sNIP measurement */,
  "azimuth_angle" REAL /* Azimuth Angle of the sun */,
  "dry_bulb_temp" REAL /* Tower Dry Bulb Temperature */,
  "wet_bulb_temp" REAL /* Tower Wet Bulb Temperature */,
  "dew_point_temp" REAL /* Tower Dew Point Temperature */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative Humidity */,
  "total_cloud_cover" REAL /* Total Cloud Cover */,
  "peak_wind_speed" REAL /* Peak Wind Speed at 6ft */,
  "avg_wind_direction" REAL /* Average Wind Direction at 6ft */,
  "station_pressure" REAL /* Station Pressure */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Accumulated Precipitation */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Snow Depth */,
  "moisture" REAL /* Moisture measurement */,
  "albedo" REAL /* Albedo (CMP11) measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that recorded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raw data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is approved for use */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, custom) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for generating the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry with the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution for the issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the metadata is associated with */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_sensors" (
  "station_sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station-sensor association */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_sensors_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
